race.comment: In a race that lacks depth OCTOBER MANIFESTO (7) is a standout. Two runs this prep have had merit, the latest a desperately close second over this distance at the Gold Coast where he gave away a big start on straightening. Cherry ripe now and just needs to hold his form to be breaking the maiden status. ABLESHEEBA (5) had been going okay until stretched to 1710m at Ipswich last time where he struggled. Very fit three-year-old who can improve coming back to a more suitable journey. DIVIL A BIT (3) raced back in the field and couldn't make an impression first-up over 1300m at the Gold Coast. Backs up six days later and an accomplished senior rider goes on. Expecting a much better effort. MISHPAT (11) ran a far better race last start when fourth-up from a spell, battling on well for third over 1210m at Toowoomba. The extra trip is a small query but in a race of questionable quality she is a top four contender. Hard to make a case for the others.
